customAbilities.name: Special
customAbilities.description: The wyvern's stinger attack deals additional poison damage equl to 1 + 1 per weapon damage die.

customAbilities.name: Unsteady Mount
customAbilities.description: The wyvern has the mount ability but is only strong enough to fly in short bursts while carrying a rider; if it doesn't end its turn on solid ground, it descends 30 feet without taking falling damage. At 14th level, a wyvern replaces this with the mount ability, removing this restriction.

customAbilities.name: Support Benefit
customAbilities.description: Your wyvern whips its stinger at your foes. Until the start of your next turn, your Strikes that damage a creature in your wyvern's reach also deal 1d6 persistent poison damage. If your wyvern is nimble or savage, the persistent damage increases to 2d6.

data.age: 23 give or take a hundred or so years as a dhampir
data.name: Seika/Sekhmet
Thorne
